series_metadata.series_description: File contains original application, insurance certificate, character reference SS#, police check, renewal applications, complaint file, answer sheet from examination and correspondence. These records were under the jurisdication of the Department of Commerce until July 1, 2004 (Series Authorization #18000710).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Hard copy is microfilmed continually. microfilm has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: diazo copy in operating area and master microfilm record series is no longer created
